addOns.name: Burmester Surround Sound System
addOns.plainDescription: 13-speaker, 590-watt sound system replacing the standard audio setup. Adds spatial audio processing and a dedicated subwoofer in the boot.

addOns.name: Panoramic Sliding Sunroof
addOns.plainDescription: Full-length glass roof that slides open electrically. Includes a retractable sunblind and UV-blocking glass.

addOns.name: Night Package
addOns.plainDescription: Replaces chrome exterior trim with gloss black — grille surrounds, window frames, and mirror caps. Purely cosmetic.

addOns.name: Advanced Driver Assistance Package
addOns.plainDescription: Adds active lane-keeping, adaptive cruise control with stop-and-go, and blind-spot monitoring. Requires MBUX navigation.
addOns.replacesWhat: Basic cruise control and parking sensors

addOns.name: Floor Mats (All-Weather)
addOns.plainDescription: OEM rubber mats for all four footwells. The car ships with carpet mats only.

addOns.name: Window Tinting
addOns.plainDescription: Factory windows have no tint. Dealer-applied 70% VLT film meets LTA limits.

addOns.name: Dashcam (Front + Rear)
addOns.plainDescription: No dashcam fitted as standard. Dealer installs a hardwired front-and-rear unit with parking mode.

notIncluded.name: Floor Mats (All-Weather)
notIncluded.description: OEM rubber mats for all four footwells. The car ships with carpet mats only.

activePromotions.description: May 2025 showroom launch discount — applied at point of registration

addOns.name: Burmester 3D Surround Sound
addOns.plainDescription: 15-speaker, 710-watt system with height channels for 3D audio. Replaces the standard 9-speaker setup entirely.

addOns.name: Off-Road Engineering Package
addOns.plainDescription: Adds underbody protection plates, a locking rear differential, and trail mode in the drive selector. Does not raise ride height.

addOns.name: Night Package
addOns.plainDescription: Swaps chrome exterior badges, mirror caps, and window frames for gloss black versions. No mechanical changes.

addOns.name: AIRMATIC Air Suspension
addOns.plainDescription: Replaces the standard steel-spring suspension with an air-spring setup that adjusts ride height automatically at speed or on demand.

addOns.name: Cargo Liner
addOns.plainDescription: The boot has no liner. OEM rubber liner protects against spills and scratches when loading.

addOns.name: Window Tinting
addOns.plainDescription: No factory tint. Dealer applies 70% VLT film to side and rear windows within LTA regulations.

addOns.name: Tow Bar
addOns.plainDescription: GLC300 is rated to tow 2,000 kg but ships with no tow bar fitted. Dealer-installed detachable unit.

wheels.name: 20-inch AMG alloy, five-twin-spoke titanium grey finish
21-inch AMG forged alloy, cross-spoke matte black finish

addOns.name: Burmester High-End 3D Sound System
addOns.plainDescription: 24-speaker, 1,590-watt system with Dolby Atmos support. Built specifically for the GLC cabin dimensions.

addOns.name: AMG Performance Exhaust
addOns.plainDescription: Stainless steel exhaust with active flaps that open at high rpm for a louder sound. Noticeable difference in tunnel and at startup.

addOns.name: AMG Carbon Fibre Interior Package
addOns.plainDescription: Replaces dashboard trim and door inserts with real woven carbon fibre panels. Adds carbon fibre shift paddles.

addOns.name: AMG Track Pace & Telemetry
addOns.plainDescription: Adds the AMG Track Pace app to the instrument cluster — logs lap times, g-forces, and tyre temperatures via MBUX. Requires AMG Driver's Package for top-speed removal.
addOns.replacesWhat: Standard sport display in instrument cluster

addOns.name: AMG Floor Mats (Velour)
addOns.plainDescription: Car ships with standard mats. AMG-logoed velour set fits precisely and adds a cabin finish consistent with the exterior.

addOns.name: Paint Protection Film (Full Front)
addOns.plainDescription: No PPF applied at factory. Self-healing film covers bonnet, front bumper, and wing mirrors against stone chips.

addOns.name: Ceramic Brake Upgrade
addOns.plainDescription: Standard steel brakes are adequate. AMG ceramic composite brakes cut unsprung weight by 20 kg and resist fade on track.
